College Park Senate

October 1995

Appendix M: University of Maryland Policy on the Collection, Use and Protection of ID Numbers VI-26.00(A)

The policy below is current as of this publication. For more information and possible updates go to: https://policies.umd.edu/general- administration/university-of-maryland-policy-on-the-collection-use-and- protection-of-id-numbers/

(Approved by the President May 31, 2005; Technical Amendment November 7, 2013)
